primarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
primarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
sources.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: Bologna Regional Qualifier summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used to recover structured legend rows and fallback deck slugs.

eventPrimarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
eventPrimarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

decklistSource.label: Draven official best-of decklist
decklistSource.description: Decklist parsed directly from the official Riot/Riftbound event recap.

secondaryDeckSources.label: Draven Riftbound.gg best-of deck
secondaryDeckSources.description: Trusted Riftbound.gg Best of Legend deck reference preserved as a secondary source.

resolvedCard.name: Battering Ram
resolvedCard.effect: I cost :rb_energy_1: less for each card you've played this turn, to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:.

resolvedCard.name: Ezreal - Prodigy
resolvedCard.effect:
When you play me, discard 1, then draw 2.
Optional additional costs you pay cost :rb_energy_1: or :rb_rune_rainbow: less.

resolvedCard.name: Fizz - Trickster
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than :rb_energy_3:, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)

resolvedCard.name: Nocturne - Horrifying
resolvedCard.effect:
[Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)
As you look at or reveal me from the top of your deck, you may banish me. If you do, you may play me for :rb_rune_rainbow:.

resolvedCard.name: Noxus Hopeful
resolvedCard.effect: [Legion] — I cost :rb_energy_2: less. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.)

resolvedCard.name: Rhasa the Sunderer
resolvedCard.effect: I cost :rb_energy_1: less for each card in your trash.

resolvedCard.name: Traveling Merchant
resolvedCard.effect: When I move, discard 1, then draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Bushwhack
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
Friendly units enter ready this turn. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Called Shot
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_rune_chaos: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. Draw one and recycle the other.

resolvedCard.name: Fight or Flight
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

resolvedCard.name: Hard Bargain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays :rb_energy_2:.

resolvedCard.name: Piercing Light
resolvedCard.effect:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2::rb_rune_fury: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield, then deal 2 to up to one other unit.

resolvedCard.name: Rebuke
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Stacked Deck
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

resolvedCard.name: Scrapheap
resolvedCard.effect: When this is played, discarded, or killed, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Seal of Discord
resolvedCard.effect: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_chaos:. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

resolvedCard.name: Spinning Axe
resolvedCard.effect:
[Quick-Draw] (This has [Reaction]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
[Equip] :rb_rune_rainbow: (:rb_rune_rainbow:: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[Temporary] (If this is unattached, kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)

resolvedCard.name: Obelisk of Power
resolvedCard.effect: At the start of each player's first Beginning Phase, that player channels 1 rune.

resolvedCard.name: The Candlelit Sanctum
resolvedCard.effect: When you conquer here, look at the top two cards of your Main Deck. You may recycle one or both of them. Put those you don't back in any order.

resolvedCard.name: Zaun Warrens
resolvedCard.effect: When you conquer here, discard 1, then draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Brynhir Thundersong
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, opponents can't play cards this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Hard Bargain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays :rb_energy_2:.

resolvedCard.name: Invert Timelines
resolvedCard.effect: Each player discards their hand, then draws 4.

resolvedCard.name: Last Rites
resolvedCard.effect: [Equip] — :rb_rune_chaos:, Recycle 2 cards from your trash (Pay the cost: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Piercing Light
resolvedCard.effect:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2::rb_rune_fury: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield, then deal 2 to up to one other unit.

resolvedCard.name: Rebuke
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Switcheroo
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Swap the Might of two units at the same battlefield this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Thermo Beam
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Kill all gear.
